expectations.text: Did NOT trigger the marketing skill (not a brand/product naming task)
expectations.evidence: The response gives pet name ideas with no marketing framework, brand positioning language, or skill-characteristic framing.

expectations.text: Gives a normal, friendly set of cat name ideas
expectations.evidence: The response provides categorized name suggestions (personality-forward, grey-inspired, dignified, cozy) with playful commentary appropriate for a pet naming request.
